utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh . Oh ! Ma am ? Excuse me , ma am ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_put your cigarette out on a tree

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You can not put your cigarette out on a tree !

emotion_cause.span: 2_put your cigarette out on a tree

utterances.speaker: The Smoking Woman
utterances.text: Yeah I can , it worked real well .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No but you should not ! Do not ever do that again .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Yeah I can , it worked real well .

utterances.speaker: The Smoking Woman
utterances.text: I will not ! Until I have my next cigarette .

emotion_cause.span: 4_you should not ! Do not ever do that again .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hold it ! N . Y . P . D ! Freeze punk !

emotion_cause.span: 5_I will not ! Until I have my next cigarette .
6_Hold it ! N . Y . P . D ! Freeze punk !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah that is right you are so busted . Book em .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Save it Red ! Unless you wanna spend the night in the slammer , you apologize to the tree .

utterances.speaker: The Smoking Woman
utterances.text: I am not going to apologize to a tree !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You apologize to the tree right now or I am calling for backup . Backup ! Backup ! !
